The gradle-wrapper.jar is a binary file that cannot be bundled here.

To generate it, run ONE of the following after opening the project:

Option A – if you have Gradle installed globally:
    gradle wrapper --gradle-version=8.8 --distribution-type=bin

Option B – IntelliJ IDEA:
    File → Open → select the project folder
    IntelliJ will detect build.gradle and auto-download the wrapper + dependencies.

Option C – VS Code with "Spring Boot Extension Pack":
    Open folder → accept the Gradle import prompt.
